title: Presumption
content:
For the purposes of this Part an employee who has been dismissed 
by his employer shall, unless the contrary is proved, be presumed 
to have been so dismissed by reason of redundancy.
[cf. 1965 c. 62 s. 9(2) U.K.]
Last updated date
1.5.2025
